On Sun, 6 Aug 2006 22:42:11 GMT
Pav Lucistnik <pav@FreeBSD.org> mentioned:

> Synopsis: [PATCH] editors/conglomerate: fix pkg-plist, misc
>=20
> State-Changed-From-To: open->closed
> State-Changed-By: pav
> State-Changed-When: Sun Aug 6 22:40:49 UTC 2006
> State-Changed-Why:=20
> I decided not to commit your patch, because
>=20
> - I don't want to explicitly state dependencies where indirect are just f=
ine
> - I don't wat bogus plist replacements just for a sake of squelching port=
lint warning
Ok
> - No point trying to remove share/locale/rw, it's guaranteed to contain f=
iles from dependencies

It's not case, when gettext and this port are installed in differet
prefix. So port should dirrmtry all directories it creates.
>=20
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3D101522
>=20
>=20
